title: Hiker's Friend
description: This new item it's gonna help you when you are starting a new world. The Hiking Stick it's easy and cheap to craft, and while holding it, you gain Jump Boost II and Speed ​​II.
body:
This new item it's gonna help you when you are starting a new world. The Hiking Stick it's easy and cheap to craft, and while holding it, you gain Jump Boost II and Speed ​​II. 
It's cheap to craft and helps you in the early game.
